setup.firstAdminDesc: This is the first launch. Please create an admin account. The first registered user will automatically become admin.
setup.domainHint: Optional. Nginx reverse proxy and HTTPS will be auto-configured, and it will be set as the master server address.
setup.domainMismatch: Domain IP does not match server IP, please check DNS settings
setup.domainMismatchDetailed: Domain IP ({{domainIp}}) does not match server IP ({{serverIp}}), please add a DNS A record
setup.success: Initial setup complete! Please sign in with the account you just created.
setup.nginxConfigured: Nginx reverse proxy has been auto-configured.
setup.restoreSuccess: Backup restored! Please refresh the page and sign in.
setup.backupHint: If you have a previous backup file, you can restore data here
